mapper.sql: r.id, r.bike_id, r.user_id, r.description, r.images, r.status, r.admin_remark, r.create_time, r.handle_time
mapper.select:
SELECT , b.bike_code, u.username FROM bike_repair r LEFT JOIN bike b ON r.bike_id = b.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id
AND r.status = #{status} AND b.bike_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bikeCode}, '%')
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT , b.bike_code, u.username FROM bike_repair r LEFT JOIN bike b ON r.bike_id = b.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bike_repair (bike_id, user_id, description, images, status) VALUES (#{bikeId}, #{userId}, #{description}, #{images}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bike_repair WHERE status = #{status}
